_guide.title: Hamplee Hamper Catalog
how_to_add_a_hamper: 1. Copy any hamper object from the 'hampers' array below.
3. Add your hamper image to the matching asset folder (e.g. asset/gourmet/).
4. Update all fields — name, price, description, highlights, image path.
6. Run: node scripts/build-hampers-data.js  — this updates the website.
7. To show on the homepage, set 'featured': true (only 4 show at a time).
